title: A wrong or hallucinated reply reaches and harms a customer.
description: A wrong or hallucinated reply reaches and harms a customer.
mitigation: Human approval before send (`INV-001`, `ADR-0001`, `AC-003`); retrieval grounding with citation-or-defer (`INV-002`, `ADR-0002`, `AC-002`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-001", "Risk": "A wrong or hallucinated reply reaches and harms a customer.", "Impact": "High", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "Human approval before send (`INV-001`, `ADR-0001`, `AC-003`); retrieval grounding with citation-or-defer (`INV-002`, `ADR-0002`, `AC-002`).", "Owner": "STK-003", "MVP/Full": "MVP"}}

title: PII leaks to an unapproved tool, model, or log.
description: PII leaks to an unapproved tool, model, or log.
mitigation: PII stays inside the trust boundary (`INV-003`, `NFR-003`); security PII policy (`ASM-003`, `STK-002`); negative egress tests (`AC-004`, `TEST-004`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-002", "Risk": "PII leaks to an unapproved tool, model, or log.", "Impact": "High", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "PII stays inside the trust boundary (`INV-003`, `NFR-003`); security PII policy (`ASM-003`, `STK-002`); negative egress tests (`AC-004`, `TEST-004`).", "Owner": "STK-002", "MVP/Full": "MVP"}}

title: Prompt-injection via malicious email content steers the agent into unintended actions.
description: Prompt-injection via malicious email content steers the agent into unintended actions.
mitigation: Treat email content as data, never instructions; explicit tool allow-list and bounded loop (`INV-005`, `ADR-0003`); outputs grounded and human-gated (`ADR-0001`/`ADR-0002`).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-003", "Risk": "Prompt-injection via malicious email content steers the agent into unintended actions.", "Impact": "High", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "Treat email content as data, never instructions; explicit tool allow-list and bounded loop (`INV-005`, `ADR-0003`); outputs grounded and human-gated (`ADR-0001`/`ADR-0002`).", "Owner": "STK-003", "MVP/Full": "MVP"}}

title: Runaway agent loop or unbounded cost.
description: Runaway agent loop or unbounded cost.
mitigation: Hard per-run cost/iteration cap + allow-list (`INV-005`, `ADR-0003`, `NFR-004`); validated by `POC-001`; cost alerting from the audit trail.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-004", "Risk": "Runaway agent loop or unbounded cost.", "Impact": "Medium", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "Hard per-run cost/iteration cap + allow-list (`INV-005`, `ADR-0003`, `NFR-004`); validated by `POC-001`; cost alerting from the audit trail.", "Owner": "STK-003", "MVP/Full": "MVP"}}

title: Auto-send enabled on an over-optimistic accuracy read (mis-calibration).
description: Auto-send enabled on an over-optimistic accuracy read (mis-calibration).
mitigation: Auto-send gated on `EXP-001` PASS + approved whitelist (`DEC-004`/`ADR-0004`); per-category error monitoring and kill-switch in PH-2; `INV-001` holds until then.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-005", "Risk": "Auto-send enabled on an over-optimistic accuracy read (mis-calibration).", "Impact": "High", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "Auto-send gated on `EXP-001` PASS + approved whitelist (`DEC-004`/`ADR-0004`); per-category error monitoring and kill-switch in PH-2; `INV-001` holds until then.", "Owner": "STK-001", "MVP/Full": "Full"}}

title: Knowledge base is stale or thin, so grounding coverage is low and deferral rate is high (low deflection).
description: Knowledge base is stale or thin, so grounding coverage is low and deferral rate is high (low deflection).
mitigation: Measure retrieval coverage in `EXP-001`; deferral is safe (`INV-002`); feed gaps back to KB owners; track against `KPI-001`.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "RISK-006", "Risk": "Knowledge base is stale or thin, so grounding coverage is low and deferral rate is high (low deflection).", "Impact": "Medium", "Likelihood": "Medium", "Mitigation": "Measure retrieval coverage in `EXP-001`; deferral is safe (`INV-002`); feed gaps back to KB owners; track against `KPI-001`.", "Owner": "STK-004", "MVP/Full": "MVP"}}
